creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Re: <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/fdp-primer/book/#structure-locale>

I see <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/blob/main/website/Makefile>, <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/blob/main/website/data/en/events/events2023.toml>, <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/blob/main/website/content/en/events/_index.adoc> and its parent <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/tree/main/website/content/en/events>, however (sorry): 

* I can not tell what's responsible for representation of 
  .toml file content. e.g. 

    startDate = "2023-03-30"
    endDate = "2023-04-02"

  as 30 - 02 April, 2023

– orientation, please. 

TIA
